text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this on my forehead?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll have to talk to Trainer, then go see the doct—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Does that mean I have to take off my
mask?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... but it hurts so bad. I really need to go see a
doctor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! I can't take it off!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like El Condor Pasa is having some
trouble with her complexion...
